case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS JOHNSON, MONTY T.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-03-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-04-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST - TO FURTHER INVESTIGATE VICTIMS OF VIOLENT CRIMES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MONTY T. $698.90 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $724.40, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $698.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MONTY T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MONTY T.
